---
title: "SKA Intromediate sea kayaking course day 1"
date: 2018-06-09
categories: ["course","anglesey"]
image: https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/ZNYfUZ8ZGhtC7MmIOy-ypVNxf3RI-ny4oJmsuog9PgM-768x576.jpg
---

- Distance: 8 km
- [Strava](https://www.strava.com/activities/1628016763)



![](https://dgtzuqphqg23d.cloudfront.net/ZNYfUZ8ZGhtC7MmIOy-ypVNxf3RI-ny4oJmsuog9PgM-768x576.jpg)
